title: Fix voice interaction and implement fully autonomous hands-free background operation

requirements.text: Fix the broken voice interaction system. The Web Speech API (SpeechRecognition) must initialize correctly on page load, request microphone permission automatically, and begin continuous background listening without requiring any user click or touch. Debug and resolve any errors preventing speech recognition from starting, including browser compatibility issues, permission handling failures, or recognition not restarting after it stops. The assistant must be fully operational hands-free from the moment the dashboard loads.
acceptanceCriteria: Microphone permission is requested automatically on dashboard load without any user interaction
SpeechRecognition starts in continuous mode immediately after permission is granted
The assistant detects the wake word ('Jarvis' by default) without any button press
After wake word detection, the assistant enters full listening mode and processes the command
The assistant responds with synthesized speech (SpeechSynthesis) without any manual trigger
If recognition stops or errors out, it automatically restarts within 1 second
Console shows no uncaught errors related to speech recognition initialization
The WaveformVisualizer and StatusIndicator reflect the correct listening/processing/speaking states in real time

requirements.text: Implement fully autonomous background operation mode. The assistant must run silently and continuously in the background — listening for the wake word, processing commands, and executing actions (open URLs, control volume/brightness, scroll, search Wikipedia, respond with speech) — all without any touch or click from the user. This includes: (1) auto-starting the wake word listener on app load, (2) automatically restarting recognition after each interaction or timeout, (3) executing all PC control commands (open app/URL, volume, brightness, scroll) purely via voice without needing UI button clicks, and (4) ensuring the full voice command loop (listen → process → respond → return to listening) cycles automatically with no manual intervention required at any step.

quotes: i want like app which run in background fully automatic open any open do anything without touchuning

acceptanceCriteria: On dashboard load, wake word listening begins automatically with no user interaction
After speaking a command and receiving a response, the assistant automatically returns to wake word listening mode
Voice commands alone (no UI clicks) can trigger: open URL, volume up/down, brightness up/down, scroll up/down, Wikipedia search
The recognition loop never permanently stops — it restarts automatically after errors, end events, or timeouts
The full voice interaction cycle (wake word → command → response → back to listening) completes end-to-end without any touch input
Status indicator always shows the current state (wake-listening, listening, processing, speaking) updating in real time
The app functions correctly even when the browser window is not in focus, to the extent permitted by browser APIs

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Use only the browser's native Web Speech API (SpeechRecognition and SpeechSynthesis) — no external voice/AI service integrations
All voice command processing and PC control logic must remain client-side in the frontend hooks
Backend schema and Motoko actor must not be changed unless strictly necessary for this fix
nonGoals: Adding new voice commands or PC control features beyond what is already implemented
Changing the visual design or animations of the dashboard
Implementing push notifications or native OS background process APIs
Modifying user authentication, registration, or login flows
Adding new backend endpoints or data models
